Criteria Summary: Home page displays hero and featured products
Pass Condition: Hero section and at least one product section visible with correct links

Criteria Summary: All products load in grid with name/image/price/rating
Pass Condition: Grid displays all products with count shown

Criteria Summary: PDP shows all product fields and stock status
Pass Condition: Name/brand/price/rating/specs/stock all present; Add to Cart disabled when out of stock

Criteria Summary: Header search navigates to catalogue with query
Pass Condition: Navigates to /products?search=<term> with filtered results

Criteria Summary: Sidebar search filters products inline and updates count
Pass Condition: Results and count update in real time

Criteria Summary: Category filter shows only selected category products
Pass Condition: Correct products shown; count updates; All resets to full list

Criteria Summary: Brand filter shows only selected brand products
Pass Condition: Results filtered correctly by brand

Criteria Summary: Price slider filters out products above selected max
Pass Condition: Only products at or below max price shown

Criteria Summary: Rating filter shows products at or above minimum rating
Pass Condition: Products below minimum rating excluded

Criteria Summary: In-Stock filter hides out-of-stock products
Pass Condition: Products with stock=0 are removed from results

Criteria Summary: Clear button resets all filters
Pass Condition: All filters reset; all products shown; filter count removed

Criteria Summary: Price Low to High sorts all categories ascending
Pass Condition: All products sorted by ascending price consistently across categories

Criteria Summary: Best Rated sorts highest to lowest rating
Pass Condition: Products sorted by descending rating

Criteria Summary: Add to Cart from listing adds 1 unit and updates badge
Pass Condition: Cart count +1; toast shown

Criteria Summary: Add to Cart from PDP adds selected quantity
Pass Condition: Cart updated with correct quantity

Criteria Summary: Cart page shows all items with correct totals
Pass Condition: Items

Criteria Summary: Quantity controls update totals; Remove removes item
Pass Condition: Line subtotal and grand total recalculate on quantity change and removal

Criteria Summary: Free shipping applied at £50+
Pass Condition: Shipping shows FREE and total = subtotal when above threshold

Criteria Summary: Cart persists across page refresh
Pass Condition: Cart items and quantities preserved in localStorage

Criteria Summary: Add/remove to wishlist works and persists
Pass Condition: Button state changes; wishlist page reflects additions and removals

Criteria Summary: Login validates email presence and credentials
Pass Condition: Blank email shows error; wrong credentials show error; correct creds log in

Criteria Summary: Registration validates all required fields and password match
Pass Condition: Missing fields show errors; mismatched passwords show error; valid form registers

Criteria Summary: Checkout validates required fields on submit
Pass Condition: Errors shown for empty required fields; form not submitted

Criteria Summary: Successful checkout redirects to order success
Pass Condition: Order reference shown; cart cleared; redirected to /order-success

Criteria Summary: Mobile menu opens/closes and layout is responsive
Pass Condition: Menu toggles on tap; closes on navigation; layout adapts to viewport
